temporal_description: A medium shot shows an older Asian man with graying hair, wearing a gray suit jacket over a light blue collared shirt, sitting at a dining table. He is actively eating, using chopsticks to pick food from a white bowl in front of him. The table is set with several other small dishes. In the background, the out-of-focus figures of other people are visible, suggesting a group meal. A watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is present in the upper left corner of the frame. The camera cuts to a close-up of the same man, now looking to his right and speaking with an animated expression. The background remains dark and out of focus, keeping the attention on the man. The "风行网" watermark is still visible. A man speaks in a slightly impatient and dismissive tone, as if trying to cut through a conversation. He says, "他就这么熟，别那么多废话了。" The camera angle shifts slightly, showing the man from a side profile as he continues to speak. He appears to be making a point, his expression serious. The shot is tight, focusing on his face and upper body. The "风行网" watermark remains in the upper left. His voice then becomes more reflective and a bit weary as he adds, "我也很久没在这吃东西了。" The background is quiet, with only the faint, ambient sounds of a room, suggesting a casual gathering or restaurant. There is no music.
